---
title: "Cover"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
number-sections: false
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
css: assets/cover.css
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          h1.title { display: none; }
          header#title-block-header { display: none; }
        </style>
---

::: {.cover-page}
![Math for Machine Learning — A simulation-first approach, by Nithin Vadekkapat](figures/cover.png){.book-cover-image fig-align="center"}
:::
